named-native-query.name: AccountEntity.getAccountByCustomerId
named-native-query.query: SELECT A.Account_Holder_Name AS AccountHolderName, Account_Number AS AccountNumber, Account_Balance AS Account_Balance, Account_Type AS Account_Type, Account_Status AS Account_Status, PAN_NUMBER AS PAN_NUMBER FROM TB_Account_Details A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = :customerId AND A.ACCOUNT_TYPE = :accountType

named-native-query.name: AccountEntity.getAccountBalanceByCustomerId
named-native-query.query: SELECT A.Account_Holder_Name AS AccountHolderName, Account_Number AS AccountNumber, Account_Balance AS Account_Balance, PAN_NUMBER AS PAN_NUMBER, Account_Type AS Account_Type, Account_Status AS Account_Status FROM TB_Account_Details A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = :customerId AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = :accountNumber
